entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics, part of PrettyGoodAI. Am I speaking with Marcus?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Hi, actually, this is Marcus Thompson calling. I'm hoping to schedule an appointment for my child.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Please tell me your child's full name and date of birth.

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Sure. My child's name is Jordan Thompson, and the date of birth is September 14, 2014.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I have the name as Jordan Thompson and the date of birth as September 14, 2014. Could you spell the first and last name for me?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Absolutely. The first name is J-O-R-D-A-N, and the last name is T-H-O-M-P-S-O-N.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Do you want to use a phone number to look up the record, or should I confirm the name and date of birth again?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: We can use the phone number to look up the record. The number is +1 860-850-9755.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: I have the number as 860-850-9755 and the date of birth as September 14th, 2014. Is that correct?

entries.speaker: Patient
entries.text: Yes, that’s correct. That’s our phone number and the right date of birth for Jordan.

entries.speaker: Agent
entries.text: Connecting you to a representative. Please wait. Hello, you've reached the Pretty Good AI test line. Goodbye.
